creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
Hello John;
 
 Please look at this PR to see if there is something that
 we want to integrate from there before for 3.7:
 
 ports/161218: Update x11-toolkits/swt-devel to version 3.6.
 
 Also, the latest stable release is:
 
 3.7.1 Final Release - 10 September 2011
 
 Hopefully we can update to that version instead?
 
 best regards,
 
 Pedro.
